title: neottia nephrophylla
intro: Neottia nephrophylla, also known as the western false lily of the valley, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Neottia nephrophylla include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Neottia nephrophylla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically in the form of salves or creams.
